name: letscoding
description: Local-first multi-model coding agent desktop app

scripts.probe: node scripts/use-abi.mjs electron && electron-vite build && node scripts/launch-probe.mjs
scripts.shot:sidebar: node scripts/use-abi.mjs electron && LC_PREVIEW=1 electron-vite build && electron scripts/shot-sidebar.mjs --no-sandbox
scripts.shot:app: node scripts/use-abi.mjs electron && electron-vite build && node scripts/shot-app.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/use-abi.mjs electron && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
